branch_review_rows.reading: Retain as review-only because connector/MPO branch behavior still overlaps diffusion and late-cycle catch-up, which makes guarded truth usage too mixed for now.
Promote into guarded training context because the branch patch restored role geometry and these rows stay concentrated in re-ignition/major-markup windows.
Promote into guarded training context because the branch patch restored role geometry and these rows stay concentrated in re-ignition/major-markup windows.
Promote into guarded training context because packaging/process enabler now binds cleanly enough to the strengthened branch role geometry.

interpretation: V1.12AW does not promote all branch rows at once; it uses the patch evidence to make a narrower guarded-admission split.
Rows admitted here move only into a guarded training-facing context, not into formal training rights.
The connector/MPO branch remains review-only because its late-cycle and diffusion overlap is still structurally mixed.
